swap results between locally deployed V3 stack and mainnet V3 factory Test Strategy: 1. Fork Ethereum mainnet at a fixed block 2. Deploy test ERC20 tokens 3. Deploy our local V3 factory (ported contracts) 4. Create identical pools on BOTH mainnet V3 factory AND our local factory 5. Initialize pools to same sqrtPriceX96 6. Add identical liquidity positions to both pools 7. Execute same swaps on both pools 8. Assert outputs match exactly (or within dust tolerance)","kind":"dev","methods":{"test_swapParity_feeTier500_zeroForOne()":{"details":"Compares swap outputs between mainnet and local V3 pools"},"test_swapParity_multiplePositions()":{"details":"Ensures tick crossing behavior matches"},"uniswapV3MintCallback(uint256,uint256,bytes)":{"details":"In the implementation you must pay the pool tokens owed for the minted liquidity. The caller of this method must be checked to be a UniswapV3Pool deployed by the canonical UniswapV3Factory.","params":{"amount0Owed":"The amount of token0 due to the pool for the minted liquidity","amount1Owed":"The amount of token1 due to the pool for the minted liquidity","data":"Any data passed through by the caller via the IUniswapV3PoolActions#mint call"}},"uniswapV3SwapCallback(int256,int256,bytes)":{"details":"In the implementation you must pay the pool tokens owed for the swap. The caller of this method must be checked to be a UniswapV3Pool deployed by the canonical UniswapV3Factory. amount0Delta and amount1Delta can both be 0 if no tokens were swapped.","params":{"amount0Delta":"The amount of token0 that was sent (negative) or must be received (positive) by the pool by the end of the swap. If positive, the callback must send that amount of token0 to the pool.","amount1Delta":"The amount of token1 that was sent (negative) or must be received (positive) by the pool by the end of the swap. If positive, the callback must send that amount of token1 to the pool.","data":"Any data passed through by the caller via the IUniswapV3PoolActions#swap call"}}},"stateVariables":{"INITIAL_SQRT_PRICE_X96":{"details":"Starting price: 1 tokenA = 2000 tokenB (like ETH/USDC) sqrtPriceX96 = sqrt(2000 * 10^6 / 10^18) * 2^96 \u2248 sqrt(2e-12) * 2^96 For token0 < token1, price = token1/token0"},"TEST_LIQUIDITY":{"details":"Liquidity amount for test positions"}},"title":"UniswapV3 Ported Swap Parity Fork test_swapParity_feeTier500_zeroForOne().details: Compares swap outputs between mainnet and local V3 pools

uniswapV3MintCallback(uint256,uint256,by.details: In the implementation you must pay the pool tokens owed for the minted liquidity. The caller of this method must be checked to be a UniswapV3Pool deployed by the canonical UniswapV3Factory.

params.amount0Owed: The amount of token0 due to the pool for the minted liquidity
params.amount1Owed: The amount of token1 due to the pool for the minted liquidity
params.data: Any data passed through by the caller via the IUniswapV3PoolActions#mint call

uniswapV3SwapCallback(int256,int256,byte.details: In the implementation you must pay the pool tokens owed for the swap. The caller of this method must be checked to be a UniswapV3Pool deployed by the canonical UniswapV3Factory. amount0Delta and amount1Delta can both be 0 if no tokens were swapped.

params.amount0Delta: The amount of token0 that was sent (negative) or must be received (positive) by the pool by the end of the swap. If positive, the callback must send that amount of token0 to the pool.
params.amount1Delta: The amount of token1 that was sent (negative) or must be received (positive) by the pool by the end of the swap. If positive, the callback must send that amount of token1 to the pool.
params.data: Any data passed through by the caller via the IUniswapV3PoolActions#swap call

test_poolStateMatch_afterInitialization(.notice: Verify pool state matches after initialization

test_poolStateMatch_afterLiquidity().notice: Verify pool state matches after adding liquidity

test_poolStateMatch_afterSwap().notice: Verify pool state matches after swap

test_swapParity_exactOutput_oneForZero().notice: Test exact output swap parity (reverse direction)

test_swapParity_feeTier10000_oneForZero(.notice: Test swap parity for 1% fee tier (reverse direction)

test_swapParity_feeTier10000_zeroForOne(.notice: Test swap parity for 1% fee tier (tick spacing 200)

test_swapParity_feeTier3000_oneForZero().notice: Test swap parity for 0.3% fee tier (reverse direction)

test_swapParity_feeTier3000_zeroForOne().notice: Test swap parity for 0.3% fee tier (tick spacing 60)

test_swapParity_feeTier500_oneForZero().notice: Test swap parity for 0.05% fee tier (reverse direction)

test_swapParity_feeTier500_zeroForOne().notice: Test swap parity for 0.05% fee tier (tick spacing 10)

test_swapParity_multiplePositions().notice: Test parity with multiple liquidity positions

test_swapParity_size_medium_oneForZero().notice: Test parity for medium trade size (reverse direction)

test_swapParity_size_medium_zeroForOne().notice: Test parity for medium trade size

test_swapParity_size_small_zeroForOne().notice: Test parity for small trade size

test_swapParity_size_tiny_oneForZero().notice: Test parity across multiple trade sizes (reverse direction, tiny)

test_swapParity_size_tiny_zeroForOne().notice: Test parity across multiple trade sizes for 0.3% pool (tiny)

uniswapV3MintCallback(uint256,uint256,by.notice: Called to `msg.sender` after minting liquidity to a position from IUniswapV3Pool#mint.

uniswapV3SwapCallback(int256,int256,byte.notice: Called to `msg.sender` after executing a swap via IUniswapV3Pool#swap.
